title: Cap and cartridge unit
abstract: A cartridge including a first guide rib and a second guide rib that extend in the Y direction and project outward in the X direction. In an attachment state in which a cap is attached to the cartridge, the cap includes a sealing wall having a liquid holding portion that faces the liquid supply portion, a first projecting rib projecting in a direction opposite to a projecting direction of the first guide rib, a second projecting rib projecting in a direction opposite to a projecting direction of the second guide rib, a first recessed portion that is formed between the sealing wall and the first projecting rib and accommodates the first guide rib, and a second recessed portion that is formed between the sealing wall and the second projecting rib and accommodates the second guide rib.
claims: 1. A cap configured to be attached to or detached from a cartridge having a liquid supply portion, the cap comprising: when a Z direction is a direction that extends along the liquid supply portion, a Y direction is a longitudinal direction of the cap that intersects the Z direction, and an X direction is a lateral direction of the cap that intersects the Y direction and the Z direction, in an attachment state in which the cap is attached to the cartridge including a first guide rib and a second guide rib that extend in the Y direction and project outward in the X direction, a sealing wall having a liquid holding portion that faces the liquid supply portion; a first projecting rib projecting in a direction opposite to a projecting direction of the first guide rib; a second projecting rib projecting in a direction opposite to a projecting direction of the second guide rib; a first recessed portion that is formed between the sealing wall and the first projecting rib and accommodates the first guide rib; and
